name: JiimSmith Team API rejects invalid input with 4xx
description: Verify core Team API validation paths fail safely with JSON 4xx responses and do not leak cross-tenant or missing-resource data.

planSteps.description: Send GET {base_url}/api/v1/team/members and store the id of the member whose display_name is Adam (Lead).
Send POST {base_url}/api/v1/team/strategy/sessions with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id and a payload missing the required inputs field or containing an invalid inputs shape.
Verify the response status is in the 4xx range, typically 422, with a JSON error detail, not a 5xx.
Send GET {base_url}/api/v1/team/campaigns/not-a-real-campaign-id/board with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id.
Verify the response is 404 or another clean 4xx with a JSON error body, not a 500.
Send GET {base_url}/api/v1/team/tasks/not-a-real-task-id with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id.
Verify the response is 404 or another clean 4xx with a JSON error body, not a 500.
